meaning: vt.不理睬,忽视,[律](因证据不足而)驳回诉讼
examples: It would be a mistake to ignore his opinion.
Such arguments ignore the question of where ultimate responsibility lay.
We cannot afford to ignore this warning.
Thus, insider trading laws ignore many people who use non-public information in their investment decisions.
That however can hardly be a source of surprise when we increasingly ignore the true meaning of Christmas.
